EmailTemplate.description: Container Service Email Template for Case when its Approved.
EmailTemplate.name: CONTAINER Service Case Approved Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Your case has been Approved
EmailTemplate.textOnly: The following case has been approved Company: {!Case.Account} Case: {!Case.CaseNumber}: {!Case.Subject} Owner: {!Case.OwnerFullName} Click on the link to access the case: {!Case.Link}
